title: The Prince of Naniwa
overview: After the Nationals, Seigaku goes on a trip to Osaka for the purpose of training with Shitenhouji. Meanwhile, back in America, Ryoma re-encounters with Ryoga, whom he sees training in a slum.

title: Turbulence, The Young Atobe
overview: The story of Hyōtei's Third year regulars when they first entered middle school.

title: The Prince of Naniwa, The Second Act
overview: When Momoshiro and Kaidō lose their cool while training the first and second years and Ryōma returns from America to Osaka.

title: The Legend of Rikkai, a Rebel Who Challenges an Emperor
overview: A flashback to when Kirihara first joins Rikkadai and challenges the last years winning regulars of the national tournament so that he can become number one. He loses to Rikkai's Big Three, but he vows to beat them.

title: Born! Captain Shiraishi Kuranosuke
overview: This is a self-contained story telling the growth of Shintenhouji's tennis club. It covers the arrival of Zaizen and also the making of Shiraishi's Entaku shot.

title: The Seven Horrible Mysteries of Seishun Gakuen
overview: Some first-years of Seigaku Tennis Club join Momoshiro and Kaidō in a scary story telling session.

title: The Two Wings of Kyushū
overview: A story that flashbacks to the days when Tachibana and Chitose were team-mates and how their remarkable tennis skills earned them this nickname.

title: Jirō's Awakening
overview: So what does it take to get the sleeping princess of Hyoutei to wake up? Entrusted by Atobe with this task, Gakuto and Oshitari follows Jirou after training to find out.
